description: Read the trap processing specification document placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/trap_processing_spec.txt. Create four SNMP trap processors in ManageEngine OpManager based on the document's requirements: LinkDown-Critical-Trap (OID 1.3.6.1.6.3.1.1.5.3, Critical), LinkUp-Recovery-Trap (OID 1.3.6.1.6.3.1.1.5.4, Clear), AuthFailure-Security-Trap (OID 1.3.6.1.6.3.1.1.5.5, Major), and ColdStart-Device-Trap (OID 1.3.6.1.6.3.1.1.5.1, Warning). Save each processor. Login to OpManager at http://localhost:8060 using admin / Admin@123.
